canonical_definition: The process by which a model develops more efficient, shared neural representations under capacity constraints, abstracting away language-specific features to encode generalized semantic content.
papers: PQR: Improving Dense Retrieval via Potential Query Modeling
ReflecTool: Towards Reflection-Aware Tool-Augmented Clinical Agents

definitions.text: The process by which a model develops more efficient, shared neural representations under capacity constraints, abstracting away language-specific features to encode generalized semantic content.
definitions.paper: PQR: Improving Dense Retrieval via Potential Query Modeling

definitions.text: The model's ability to form generalized concept representations that are shared across languages, allowing semantic information to be concentrated and abstracted away from surface linguistic forms.
definitions.paper: PQR: Improving Dense Retrieval via Potential Query Modeling

definitions.text: The ability to identify and operate on the underlying symbolic structure of a problem, separating it from its surface-level lexical representation.
definitions.paper: ReflecTool: Towards Reflection-Aware Tool-Augmented Clinical Agents

characterization: The process by which a model develops more efficient, shared neural representations under capacity constraints, abstracting away language-specific features to encode generalized semantic content.
